attributes.action: Lower the cost of pet insurance in the UK
attributes.additional_details: Pet insurance premiums in the UK are rising to unsustainable levels. Many responsible pet owners are now being charged excessive monthly fees. Pets are family. Insurance is meant to provide peace of mind — not financial strain. Without reform, more pet owners will cancel insurance, delay veterinary care or face devastating financial decisions.
attributes.background: Introduce fair caps on annual premium increases. Reward customer loyalty instead of penalising it. Ensure affordable coverage options for older pets.

rejection.details:
Remove VAT on all veterinary care services & fund new support for vet services 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759667
